title: sponia micrantha
intro: Sponia micrantha, also known as the small-fruited sponia, is a flowering plant species in the family Sapindaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sponia micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Sponia micrantha is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken internally or applied topically to relieve various health conditions.
